markdownRemark.html: Your home should be more than walls and furniture—it's the backdrop for your life's most important moments. Every corner can tell a story: the reading nook where you escape, the kitchen table where conversations flow, the wall of photos documenting your journey.

frontmatter.title: Home is where your story begins
frontmatter.excerpt: Creating spaces that reflect who you are and support who you're becoming.
frontmatter.author: joseph-crawford

authorsJson.name: Joseph Crawford
authorsJson.bio: A tech enthusiast with a passion for building scalable web applications.

frontmatter.title: Food is our common ground, a universal experience
